question: In Romans, what does Paul say God did with his Son “in the likeness of sinful flesh” to deal with sin?

choices.A: He condemned sin in the flesh
choices.B: He approved sin in the flesh
choices.C: He ignored sin in the flesh
choices.D: He rewarded sin in the flesh

teaching.title: Sin condemned in the flesh
teaching.body: Paul says God sent his Son in the likeness of sinful flesh and for sin, and condemned sin in the flesh.
